steps.title: Close the appositive
steps.content: The phrase after black ash is a nonessential description of the material. Since it begins with an em dash, it needs a matching em dash before the infinitive phrase to craft baskets.

steps.title: Keep punctuation parallel
steps.content: A uses a colon, B uses a semicolon, and D ends the sentence too early, leaving a fragment. The matching em dash correctly closes the inserted description. The answer is C.
